---
title: "Solar Neutrinos"
lang: en
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .quarto-title-block {
    display: none;
  }
</style>

<div class="course-index course-subpage">
  <a class="course-back-link" href="../index.html">← All neutrino physics materials</a>

  <section class="course-intro">
    <p class="course-kicker">Masterclass</p>
    <h1>Solar Neutrinos</h1>
    <p>
      Lecture notes and working session materials for the solar-neutrino masterclass.
      The current public version contains the lecture and the first masterclass.
    </p>
  </section>

  <section class="course-accordion" aria-label="Solar-neutrino materials">
    <details class="course-row" open>
      <summary>
        <span class="course-row-kind">Lecture</span>
        <span>Solar Neutrino Physics</span>
      </summary>
      <div class="course-row-body">
        <p>
          Solar burning, pp/CNO sources, tunnelling and thermal averaging,
          neutrino oscillations, matter effects, detector events, and a short
          statistical example.
        </p>
        <div class="course-links">
          <a href="slides/00_solar_neutrino_physics.html">Open lecture</a>
          <a href="slides/00_solar_neutrino_physics_appendix.html">Open appendix</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </details>

    <details class="course-row" open>
      <summary>
        <span class="course-row-kind">Masterclass 1</span>
        <span>Fluxes, Event Rates, and a Normalization Fit</span>
      </summary>
      <div class="course-row-body">
        <p>
          Build the no-oscillation SK-like event model from fluxes, the
          $^8$B spectrum, and the $\nu_e e$ recoil cross section. Then generate
          pseudo-data and fit the $^8$B normalization.
        </p>
        <div class="course-links">
          <a href="slides/01_solar_sources.html">Open masterclass</a>
          <a href="data/masterclass1/masterclass1_data.zip" download>Download data (.zip)</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </details>

    <details class="course-row">
      <summary>
        <span class="course-row-kind">Masterclass 2</span>
        <span>Oscillations and Fit</span>
      </summary>
      <div class="course-row-body">
        <p>
          This session will add MSW survival probabilities, day-night templates,
          pseudoexperiments, and contour construction. Materials will be added
          after the first session is fixed.
        </p>
      </div>
    </details>
  </section>
</div>
```
